news.title: Nvidia N1X/N1 laptops vs MacBook Neo: "New AI PC era" could flop due to high prices and Windows, says insider
news.description: A top supply chain insider says Nvidia’s N1X/N1 processors will target a niche market, with projected shipments of 10 million units through 2028. While the N1X offers high-performance on-device AI capabilities, it might faces limited demand as consumers favor…
